complete_current_job_first: Please complete your current job first.
weekly_inspection_required: Weekly inspection required. Upload 3 photos to receive jobs.
account_under_review: Your account is under review (rating < 3.5). No job assignments.
notified_when_nearby: You will be notified when a new job is available nearby
set_driver_id_to_receive: Set your driver ID to receive job requests
failed_accept_another_driver: Failed to accept. Another driver may have taken it.
cancel_job_confirm: A 250 ₺ penalty applies if more than half the time has passed. 3 cancellations in 7 days will suspend you for 48 hours. Continue?
driver_signal_lost: Driver position not updating. Signal may be lost.
no_map_app_found: No map app found. Opened Google Maps in browser.
intercity_subtitle: When on, long-distance (intercity) jobs will be shown to you.
driver_cancelled_rematch: Driver cancelled. Rematching you. No extra charge.
still_searching_body: No driver found. Keep waiting or call support?
withdrawal_request_received: Withdrawal request received. Payment after approval.
inspection_done: Weekly inspection complete. You can receive jobs.
registration_received_body: You will be notified when review is complete.
tow_request_sent: Tow request sent. Searching for nearby drivers...
add_email_for_receipt: Add your email in profile to receive the receipt
suspended_reason: You cannot receive jobs for 48 hours due to 3 cancellations in 7 days.
register_prompt_body: Complete the form with your details, plate number, truck type, and photos of your license and vehicle registration.
sign_in_required_body: Use the main app to sign in with your phone, then open Driver App again.
offline_banner: No internet connection. Trying to reconnect...
location_rationale_bullets:
• During an active job, the customer can track your drive on the map.

• Your location can be sent even when the app is in the background or screen is off.

• Your location is only used for the duration of the job.
location_rationale_hint: Please select "Always Allow" or "Always" on the system permission screen.
